body_transformation: The segmented body bands shift from yellow and black to deep crimson and molten gold, with each segment featuring glowing amber fissures that pulse like embers. The transparent wings now shimmer with a heat-haze distortion, their edges crackling with faint smoke trails. The stinger at the rear transforms into a flickering flame-tipped appendage, its surface covered in molten gold textures. The white facial markings become glowing ember-scaled patterns etched into the darker crimson skin, while the six legs gain subtle magma-cracked armor plating along their joints.
signature_feature: Stinger: molten gold flame-tipped appendage with glowing ember-scaled textures.
